subcodes.first_line: And after every gathering there followeth a dispersal, and after every union a separation, and after every nearness a remoteness doth ensue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و بعد هر جمعی را تفریقی و هر وصلی را فصلی و هر قربی را بعدی در عقب و از پی
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
